name: Redeem All Codes
description: Adds mod settings buttons that update a public code database and submit known public Geometry Dash vault codes.

info.name: Redeem All Codes
info.description: This uses GD's normal secret reward request. It will not bypass locked vaults, missing requirements, limited/event codes, or already-redeemed rewards. The online database is a normal GitHub-hosted JSON file.

use-online-database.name: Use online code database
use-online-database.description: Downloads codes.json from your GitHub repo. If download fails, the mod uses the cached database or built-in fallback list.

check-before-redeem.name: Check online DB before redeeming
check-before-redeem.description: When enabled, the Redeem button updates the code database first, then starts redeeming from the fresh list.

database-url.name: Database URL
database-url.description: Raw GitHub URL to codes.json. Change zBricks to your GitHub username if you fork/rename the repo.

update-db.name: Update code database
update-db.description: Downloads codes.json and saves it as the local cache.

player-name.name: Player name code
player-name.description: Optional. The Vault has a code that is your exact current player name. Leave empty to skip it.

star-count.name: Star count code
star-count.description: Optional. Vault of Secrets has a code that is your current total stars. Set 0 to skip it.

delay-ms.name: Delay between codes (ms)
delay-ms.description: Keep this at 1500ms or higher to avoid hammering RobTop's servers.

redeem-now.name: Redeem database codes
redeem-now.description: Checks the online database first if enabled, then sends codes one by one.
